# `identity` — identity templates

**Industry:** Cross-industry  ·  **Templates:** 3

Phishing templates impersonating identity providers and SSO platforms

Phishing-simulation templates for **authorized** security awareness training with [GoPhish](https://getgophish.com/) and [HailBytes SAT](https://hailbytes.com/sat?utm_source=github&utm_medium=folder_readme&utm_campaign=gophish-training-templates). See the [repository README](../README.md) for setup and the [full template catalog](../docs/CATALOG.md) for every category at a glance.

## Templates

| Template | File | Attack vector | Difficulty | Est. click rate |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| Okta Suspicious Sign-In Alert | [`okta_verification.html`](okta_verification.html) | credential_harvest | advanced | 25-45% |
| Duo Security – Device Re-enrollment | [`duo_reenroll.html`](duo_reenroll.html) | credential_harvest | intermediate | 40-60% |
| Okta – Password Expiration | [`okta_password_expiry.html`](okta_password_expiry.html) | credential_harvest | beginner | 35-55% |

## Template details

### Okta Suspicious Sign-In Alert

- **File:** [`okta_verification.html`](okta_verification.html)
- **Attack vector:** credential_harvest · **Difficulty:** advanced · **Est. click rate:** 25-45%
- **GoPhish variables:** `{{.FirstName}}` `{{.Email}}` `{{.URL}}` `{{.Tracker}}` `{{.Date}}`
- **Paired training page:** [`education/identity_education.html`](education/identity_education.html)
- **Suggested subject lines:**
  - Okta: New sign-in from Kyiv, Ukraine
  - [Security Alert] Unrecognized device accessed your Okta account
  - Action required: Suspicious activity on your company SSO account
- **Operator notes:** Advanced difficulty — lower click rate expected but highest-value target. Listing specific apps (Salesforce, GitHub) accessed increases panic. Use {{.Date}} for realism.

### Duo Security – Device Re-enrollment

- **File:** [`duo_reenroll.html`](duo_reenroll.html)
- **Attack vector:** credential_harvest · **Difficulty:** intermediate · **Est. click rate:** 40-60%
- **GoPhish variables:** `{{.FirstName}}` `{{.Email}}` `{{.URL}}` `{{.Tracker}}`
- **Paired training page:** [`education/identity_education.html`](education/identity_education.html)
- **Suggested subject lines:**
  - Action required: re-enroll your device in Duo
  - Your Duo Mobile enrollment expires soon
  - Re-verify your device to keep two-factor access
- **Operator notes:** MFA-fatigue / re-enrollment lure. Effective in orgs that already use Duo, where the request looks routine.

### Okta – Password Expiration

- **File:** [`okta_password_expiry.html`](okta_password_expiry.html)
- **Attack vector:** credential_harvest · **Difficulty:** beginner · **Est. click rate:** 35-55%
- **GoPhish variables:** `{{.FirstName}}` `{{.Email}}` `{{.URL}}` `{{.Tracker}}`
- **Paired training page:** [`education/identity_education.html`](education/identity_education.html)
- **Suggested subject lines:**
  - Your Okta password expires today
  - Reminder: reset your Okta password to avoid lockout
  - Action required: Okta password expiration
- **Operator notes:** Password-expiry is one of the most clicked lures. Complements the existing Okta verification template.

## How to use

1. In GoPhish, go to **Email Templates → New Template** and paste the HTML from the file above. Set a subject line from the suggestions.
2. Create a **Landing Page** (see [`../landing-pages/`](../landing-pages/)) to capture the click, and — where a training page is listed — redirect clickers to it so they get immediate education.
3. Configure a realistic **Sending Profile** and launch to a consented, in-scope group. Schedule during business hours for realism.

> **Before sending:** customize sender names, domains, logos, and any brand impersonations to match your engagement and your authorization scope. These templates are for authorized training only.
